name: REPUBLIC SERVICES, INC.
summary: Republic Services is one of the largest environmental services providers in North America, operating 377 collection operations, 255 transfer stations, 79 recycling centers, 207 active landfills, 24 TSDFs, 5 saltwater disposal wells, 15 deep injection wells, 9 industrial wastewater treatment facilities, and 2 polymer centers across the United States and Canada. The company provides recycling, solid waste collection, transfer, disposal, environmental solutions, and sustainability innovation services, including landfill gas-to-energy projects and plastics circularity programs.

products.name: Solid Waste Collection
products.description: Residential, small-container, and large-container solid waste collection under municipal contracts and franchise agreements.

products.name: Recycling Services
products.description: Collection and processing of recyclable materials through 79 recycling centers across the US and Canada.

products.name: Landfill Disposal
products.description: Operation of 207 active landfills providing solid waste disposal with post-closure responsibility for 124 closed landfills.

products.name: Transfer Station Operations
products.description: 255 transfer stations facilitating waste transport and handling between collection and disposal facilities.

products.name: Environmental Solutions
products.description: Treatment, storage and disposal via 24 TSDFs, 5 saltwater disposal wells, 15 deep injection wells, and 9 industrial wastewater treatment facilities.

products.name: Polymer Centers
products.description: Facilities processing plastics from curbside collection to food-grade recycled content for consumer packaging, advancing plastics circularity.

products.name: Landfill Gas-to-Energy
products.description: 84 landfill gas-to-energy and other renewable energy projects converting landfill gas into usable energy.

products.name: Blue Polymers
products.description: Joint-venture producing custom blended food-grade and non-food-grade plastic pellets from olefins supplied by Polymer Centers.

partnerships.description: Joint venture Blue Polymers to process olefins from Polymer Centers into custom blended food-grade and non-food-grade plastic pellets.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
